packageRules.description: Pin com.palantir.consistent-versions to 2.32.0; newer versions require Java 17 but branch_9x builds with Java 11
Pin org.carrot2:carrot2-core to 4.5.1; 4.8.6 requires Java 21 but branch_9x builds with Java 11
Keep org.apache.hadoop on 3.4.x; 3.5.0 requires Java 17 but branch_9x builds with Java 11
Pin dev.langchain4j to 0.35.0; 0.36.2 requires Java 17 but branch_9x builds with Java 11
Keep Error Prone on 2.31.0; the build hard-pins it to 2.31.0 for JDK11 compatibility on branch_9x
